entries.value: Target first response time is <1 hour for all severity levels. Premium/enterprise customers: <30 minutes. Critical tickets: <15 minutes. Measure from ticket creation to first human response (auto-replies do not count).
Target resolution time: critical <4 hours, high <8 hours, medium <24 hours, low <72 hours. Track median, not average (outliers skew averages). Resolution means customer confirms issue is fixed.

Target CSAT score is >90% (4+ out of 5). Below 85% requires support process review. Track per agent, per category, and per customer tier. Low CSAT on resolved tickets indicates resolution quality issues.
Target NPS is >40. World-class B2B SaaS is >50. Score breakdown: Promoters (9-10), Passives (7-8), Detractors (0-6). NPS = %Promoters - %Detractors. Survey quarterly and after key touchpoints.

Target feature request conversion rate is >10% (shipped features / total requests). Track time-to-ship for converted requests. High-vote requests that remain unshipped indicate product-market misalignment.

Target ticket deflection rate is >30%. Measured as (self-service resolutions / total potential tickets). Improve through knowledge base articles, in-app help, and chatbot automation. Higher deflection reduces support cost.

All NPS detractors (score 0-6) must receive a personal follow-up within 48 hours. Call, not email. Goal is to understand the root cause, not to change the score. Document feedback themes for product team.

Respond to all public reviews within 24 hours. Negative reviews (1-2 stars) within 4 hours. Always acknowledge the issue, never argue. Offer to continue the conversation privately. Positive reviews get a thank-you.

Tag all feedback with product area, customer tier, and sentiment. Review feedback themes weekly in product-support sync. Top 3 themes by volume should map to product roadmap items. Close the loop with customers when their request ships.

Critical: service completely unavailable, data loss risk. High: major feature broken, workaround exists. Medium: minor feature issue, no workaround needed. Low: cosmetic issue, documentation question, enhancement idea.
